agent: agent
description: Generates UML architectural diagrams and sequence diagrams from spec.md/codeanalysis.md and design.md.
tools: ['execute/getTerminalOutput', 'execute/createAndRunTask', 'execute/runInTerminal', 'read/problems', 'read/readFile', 'edit/createDirectory', 'edit/createFile', 'edit/editFiles', 'search', 'web', 'azure-mcp/search', 'sequential-thinking/*', 'todo', 'propel-iq/*']
---

---

*This generator creates UML diagrams including Conceptual, Component, Deployment, Data Flow, ERD, and Sequence diagrams.*
